result.summary: Found 3 issues: critical accessibility problem with illegible fine print, a major usability issue with the SCROLL DOWN instruction breaking visual flow, and a major issue with the top-right button text being cut off.

issues.description: The fine print terms and conditions text below the promotional sections is extremely small and nearly illegible, making it inaccessible to users with low vision
issues.suggestion: Increase font size to at least 12px, improve line-height spacing, and consider using a lighter gray color with better contrast on the yellow background. Alternatively, provide a link to a dedicated terms page with readable text

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' instruction with checkmark icons appears mid-page and disrupts the visual flow, suggesting the page design may not be optimized for the viewport
issues.suggestion: Remove or hide the SCROLL DOWN instruction, or ensure the entire promotional content is visible without requiring scrolling on most device sizes

issues.description: The yellow button in the top-right corner has no visible text label, making it unclear what action users should take
issues.suggestion: Ensure the button text is visible and readable. Add appropriate labeling such as 'Sign Up', 'Play Now', or other relevant CTA text
